summary: Partner/Driver PWA and Admin management testing COMPLETE. All 17 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI flows verified working. Partner login, vehicle categories from C# API, ride creation, admin CRUD for partners and rides all functioning correctly.

partner_login_valid.details: POST /api/partner/auth/login with chauffeur@test.com/test123 returns token and partner object

vehicle_categories.details: GET /api/partner/vehicle-categories returns normalized [{id, name}] from C# API: Luxury Sedan, Premium, Sedan

list_partner_rides.details: GET /api/partner/rides returns rides for authenticated partner

admin_partners_crud.details: POST creates, GET lists, PUT updates, DELETE removes partners

driver_login_ui.details: Driver login page loads at /driver/login with email, password, submit button

driver_dashboard_ui.details: Dashboard shows stats (Total, En attente, Acceptees), ride list, new ride button, logout

create_ride_ui.details: Create ride form shows all fields, vehicle categories dropdown loads from C# API

admin_partners_ui.details: Partners table with add/edit/delete buttons, form with all fields

admin_rides_ui.details: Rides list with status filters, expandable detail view, status change buttons, admin notes

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing
Vehicle categories normalized correctly from C# API to {id, name} format
Partner auth separate from C# auth system as designed
Admin token validation working via require_admin middleware
Mobile-first PWA design looks good with proper spacing and contrast
seed_data_creation: Test partner chauffeur@test.com exists. Some TEST_ prefixed partners created during pytest (can be cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner/Driver PWA fully functional. All partner endpoints working: auth, rides CRUD, vehicle categories from C# API. Admin endpoints for partners and rides management working. Frontend mobile PWA design is clean. No mocked APIs - all real integrations.

mocked_api.note: No APIs are mocked. Vehicle categories fetched from real C# API at api.zont.cab
